settings.heading: Wingstone, designed like a frame from a campaign
settings.text: Immersive fashion commerce with editorial pacing, limited-drop urgency, and a calmer premium shopping flow.

settings.heading: Built as a cinematic collection story
settings.copy: Full-bleed visuals, strong typography, and a slower editorial pace that makes each collection feel premium.
settings.side_heading: Made for a cleaner mobile flow
settings.side_copy: The layout keeps product discovery, urgency, and trust cues in a tighter rhythm so the storefront feels elevated on smaller screens.

settings.heading: A tighter drop grid
settings.subtext: Mobile-first cards with clearer pricing, quick add actions, and a more cinematic product rhythm.

settings.heading: A full-screen product grid
settings.text: Clean spacing, better hierarchy, and a more premium browsing cadence.

settings.heading: Friend1st sale live
settings.copy: For a limited time, the offer auto-applies in cart with a sharper mobile conversion flow.

settings.title: Easy Returns
settings.copy: Simple exchanges with no awkward friction.

settings.heading: Get early access
settings.text: New drops, restocks, and release notes before the storefront goes public.
